/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/common/utils/utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/communication.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/connections.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/cract.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/crcombat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/crmain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/crnonpl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/crplayer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/crskill.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/crypto.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/houses.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/info.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/magic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/map.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/moveuse.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/objects.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/operate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/query.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/reader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/receiving.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/script.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/sending.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/shm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/strings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/threads.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/time.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/writer.cpp.o -o game  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lpthread
